testcase.name: CODIGO Pilot — Use Cases (80%) › CODIGO compact hero shows Create Session CTA

failure.message: codigo-pilot.spec.ts:23:7 CODIGO compact hero shows Create Session CTA

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › codigo\codigo-pilot.spec.ts:23:7 › CODIGO Pilot — Use Cases (80%) › CODIGO compact hero shows Create Session CTA
TimeoutError: page.waitForResponse: Timeout 15000ms exceeded while waiting for event "response"
22 | 23 | test('CODIGO compact hero shows Create Session CTA', async ({ page }) => { > 24 | const configPromise = page.waitForResponse((r) => r.url().includes('/api/lounges/CODIGO/config'), { timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 25 | await page.goto(CODIGO_FSD_URL, { waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded' }); 26 | await configPromise; 27 | await expect(page.getByTestId('create-session-cta').or(page.getByRole('button', { name: /Create Session/i }))).toBeVisible({ timeout: 8000 }); at C:\Users\Dwayne Clark\Projects\Hookahplus\apps\app\e2e\codigo\codigo-pilot.spec.ts:24:32
